# Enum Types
enum:Aspire.Hosting.Agents.A2AInvocationMode = NonStreaming | Streaming
enum:Aspire.Hosting.Agents.AgentProtocol = A2AJsonRpc | A2AGrpc | A2AHttpJson | Responses | Mcp | AgUi | Acp
